title: Laboratory Specimen Bound To Incorrect Patient Identity
scenario: A laboratory result is returned under a specimen identifier that resolves to a different patient than the active clinical order.
initial_state: The diagnostic workflow was authorized for the active patient.
state_transition: The specimen identity chain resolves to another patient before the result is used for execution.
execution_boundary: The clinical decision based on the laboratory result is evaluated before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Specimen identity must remain continuously bound to the patient identity used for clinical execution.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the laboratory evidence is not continuously bound to the active patient identity.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when diagnostic evidence cannot be tied to the correct patient identity.
clinical_action: Execute treatment decision based on lab result
